blockMessage: This version is no longer supported. Please install the latest version.

content.title: Version 4.0 is here
content.message: This build adds the dynamic island status widget, a rebuilt uploader, and fixes the metadata patch pipeline. Older versions are no longer supported.

cards.title: Dynamic Island
cards.description: Live upload status shown directly on the TikTok upload page.

cards.title: Faster patching
cards.description: Rebuilt MP4 metadata patcher for higher-quality uploads.

cards.title: Stability fixes
cards.description: Resolved issues affecting versions prior to 4.0.
